summary: BLOCK 399 (Flex-Variant Mobile Fix) - All tests PASSED. Verified: (1) card-meta-pills containers have display:flex, flex-wrap:wrap, gap:4px (gap-1 in Tailwind), (2) variant-pill has max-width:150px, overflow:hidden, text-overflow:ellipsis, white-space:nowrap for truncation, (3) Mobile viewport (375px) correctly applies font-size:11px via CSS media query, (4) Filter bar regression test passed - justify-content:center, max-width:600px. Fixed CSS syntax error in App.css where @keyframes honeyPulse was missing closing brace.
critical_code_review_comments: PostCards.js line 175: truncStyle inline object { maxWidth: '150px', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis', whiteSpace: 'nowrap' } applied to all variant pill types
PostCards.js line 298: card-meta-pills container uses 'flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-1' className
App.css line 622-630: Mobile media query @media (max-width: 480px) sets font-size: 11px !important for variant pills
App.css FIXED: Missing closing brace for @keyframes honeyPulse was causing CSS syntax error
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing posts with variant 'Cream Transparent, Alternate Cover'
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 399 verified. Variant pills now have truncation with max-width:150px and ellipsis. Mobile viewport (375px) applies 11px font-size via CSS media query. The card-meta-pills containers use flex flex-wrap gap-1 (4px). Note: There are many 403 errors in console for image resources (likely CDN/S3 403 errors for album cover images) but these don't affect functionality.

block_399_mobile_font_size.details: Mobile (375px) variant-pill has font-size:11px via CSS media query

block_399_note_badge_text.details: Note filter button shows 'Note' (verified in filter bar)

regression_feed_loads.details: Feed loads and displays posts correctly

css_fix_applied.issue: @keyframes honeyPulse was missing closing brace, causing BLOCK 399 media query to be nested inside unclosed keyframe
css_fix_applied.fix: Added closing brace to @keyframes honeyPulse before BLOCK 399 media query comment
